message:
feat(core): add cuckoo_filter.rs — probabilistic set with deletion support (ft-283h4.18)

Cuckoo filter implementation with insert/lookup/delete in O(1), cuckoo
eviction for collision handling, configurable bucket count and size,
FNV-1a hashing, and CuckooStats diagnostics. Includes 24 proptest
properties covering no-false-negatives, insert/delete/reinsert cycles,
capacity bounds, stats consistency, and clone independence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
